data.description:
## Context

PLACEHOLDER for a future feature (do not implement yet). Discovered finalizing tepid-bus-pomp: the bespoke Pass-2 verifier chunks the findings list by a HARD-CODED count (pass2_verify batch_size=12, passes.py:400 — never config-driven, never passed at the orchestrator call site, token-naive: range(0, len(findings), 12)). It is an arbitrary mechanical guardrail (introduced in the original plan-review epic 5fd2, commit 2873a916) whose documented intent is just 'one aggregate verification pass over ALL findings (batched, NOT per-finding)'.

The workflow-engine plan-review gate (epic peak-fir-hilt) deliberately makes verify ONE aggregate call (epic AC: 'aggregate prompt verify (ONE call)') — identical to bespoke for <=12 findings, and the chosen end-state. So bespoke's count-12 chunking was NOT replicated (it would just copy a magic number).

The ONE real consideration deferred here: a single aggregate verify call could, on a pathological huge-findings ticket, exceed a model context window where the count-12 chunk would not. The engine-consistent fix is PRINCIPLED, TOKEN-BASED chunking (estimate the verify request's tokens vs the model window — like the Pass-1 finder sizing.py MODEL_LADDER/budget machinery already does — and split only when needed), NOT a magic count. This contrasts with the Pass-1 FINDER batching which IS already adaptive/token/budget-driven (sizing.py) and is full-parity.

## Success Criteria

- The workflow Pass-2 verify chunks the findings into multiple calls ONLY when the estimated request size would exceed the selected model's context window (token-based), reusing the existing sizing/window machinery rather than a hard-coded count.
- For the common case (small findings sets) it remains ONE aggregate call (no behavior change).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A token-estimate decides verify chunking (no magic batch_size constant); reuses sizing.py window/estimate helpers where possible.
- [ ] <=window findings → one aggregate verify call (unchanged); >window → minimal principled splits that re-merge verifications by finding index.
- [ ] A test exercises a >window findings set and asserts principled splitting (not count-12).
- [ ] Bespoke's hard-coded batch_size=12 is removed or also routed through the principled path (no two divergent batching rules).
data.title: Principled token-based chunking for the workflow Pass-2 verify (replace bespoke's magic batch_size=12)
